body: Nadia, thanks so much for the thoughtful note — it's always grounding to hear your perspective, especially during a stretch like this one. I've been heads-down on a couple of new deals, including a really promising seed round with [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) that I think you'd find interesting given your background in energy infrastructure. The founder is sharp, the unit economics are cleaner than anything I've seen at this stage in the climate space, and I'd love to get your read on the market timing before we move to term sheet. Would you have 30 minutes next week to connect? I feel like I learn something every time we talk, and this one feels like exactly the kind of decision where your instincts would be valuable.
